Claim_Summary: Collateral Scaffolding Deficit: Math receives strictly siloed instruction time while ELA receives cross-curricular collateral practice.
L4 Cognitive Level is the only valid proxy for the statutory requirement of 'Civic Engagement.'
ESSA removed NCLB operator accountability allowing the system to use FERPA to shield aggregate process defects as 'student privacy.'
Averaging grade cohorts inflates perceived pipeline success by approx 20 points masking the high school bottleneck.
Operator Capability Deficit: K-8 educators are not required to demonstrate L4 math mastery forcing procedural over conceptual instruction.
